security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://www.googleapis.com https://graph.microsoft.com https://api.dropboxapi.com; media-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: XO_OX (pronounced 'zoe ox') is a professional tool for creating MPC XPM programs and XPN expansion packs. Features include multi-layer pad editing, envelope and filter design, auto-chopping, MIDI controller support, and over 20 creative tools for building world-class drum kits and instruments.
